data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the automatic link generation feature, but the evidence provided does not confirm whether this functionality is implemented or functioning as expected. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a Zoom link is generated, there is no direct evidence or API reads that confirm this behavior is consistently applied or validated across all necessary integrations, particularly for Google Meet and Teams. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence of Google Meet and Teams integration.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
